invariant: Provider output cannot cite source_refs that are absent from the gated input source registry.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = fabricated provider source_ref is rejected after synthesis and cannot appear in accepted_source_refs. FAIL = fabricated source_ref survives into output evidence.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds only src-risk-valid as an input source; provider replay intentionally cites src-risk-fabricated.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Validation rejection is the expected output because the fabricated source ref is not in gated input claims.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Records the warning/counter shape required by the W5-C packet.
